critic_justifications.NY Times: Positive review praising the emotional depth and choreography while noting some pacing issues
critic_justifications.Variety: Strong review highlighting the musical's success in adapting the beloved novel with energetic staging
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Favorable reception emphasizing the Tony-winning production's appeal to both fans and newcomers
critic_justifications.NY Post: Positive review appreciating the contemporary relevance and strong ensemble work
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Generally positive with appreciation for the adaptation though noting some theatrical conventions
critic_justifications.Time Out NY: Strong review praising the choreography and emotional resonance of the piece
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Positive reception highlighting the successful translation of the source material to stage
critic_justifications.Vulture: Favorable review with some reservations about certain narrative elements
critic_justifications.Associated Press: Positive review emphasizing the show's appeal and technical achievements
critic_justifications.BroadwayWorld: Positive reception noting strong performances and production values

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with A-/A range ratings reflecting enthusiasm for the adaptation
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: High audience approval with strong positive response from Broadway attendees
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience ratings reflect strong satisfaction with the production and performances
